name: University Student — Multiple Jobs, Tuition Transfer, and Scholarship
description: Complete Jasmine Wei-Lin Chen's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\. Save the completed return as 'jasmine_chen.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide P105 (Students and Income Tax)
metadata.key_complexity: Three T4 slips; fully-exempt scholarship; tuition transfer to parent; non-deductible moving expenses trap; student loan interest
